items.title: White House report brands Smithsonian leadership as radical activists who can’t be trusted
items.dek: A White House report brands the leadership of the Smithsonian Institution, especially at the National Museum of American History, as radical activists who canno
items.body: A White House report brands the leadership of the Smithsonian Institution, especially at the National Museum of American History, as radical activists who cannot be trusted, indicating that President Donald Trump may be preparing to install his own team. The report released late on Independence Day by the White House Domestic Policy Council submitted by /u/cuicksilver [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Marine Le Pen appeal verdict: Why this moment matters for France
items.dek: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election and will now find out if she can stand.
items.body: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election and will now find out if she can stand.

items.title: The African fishermen who blame Chinese trawlers for their woes
items.dek: Fishing crews in Sierra Leone say large Chinese ships are illegally hoovering up stocks.
items.body: Fishing crews in Sierra Leone say large Chinese ships are illegally hoovering up stocks.
